'''√j-b-y''' ('''kajabay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debate|debate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debate|debate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-b-y
|-
! Lemma
| kajabay
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijabay || jijabay || shijabay || kijabay
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujabay || jujujabay || shushujabay || kukujabay
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujabay || jujabay || shujabay || kujabay
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujabay || jujabay || shujabay || kujabay
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejabay || jejabay || shejabay || kejabay
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojabay || jojojabay || shoshojabay || kokojabay
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojabay || jojabay || shojabay || kojabay
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojabay || jojabay || shojabay || kojabay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jabay || jabay || jabay || jabay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jabay || jabay || jabay || jabay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jabay || jabay || jabay || jabay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jabay || jabay || jabay || jabay
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæjabay || jæjabay || shæjabay || kæjabay
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajabay || jajajabay || shashajabay || kakajabay
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajabay || jajabay || shajabay || kajabay
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajabay || jajabay || shajabay || kajabay
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shajabay
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshajabay
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishajabay
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shajabaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshajabaynknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishajabaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shajabayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshajabaynkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishajabayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shajabayro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshajabaynkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishajabayro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shajabaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshajabaynkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishajabaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shajabaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshajabaynksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishajabaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shajabayng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshajabaynkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishajabayng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shajabayya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshajabaynkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishajabayya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shajabayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshajabaynkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishajabayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shajabaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshajabaynknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishajabaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shajabaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajabaynknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajabaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shajabaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshajabaynknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajabaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shajabayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshajabaynkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishajabayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shajabayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajabaynkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajabayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shajabayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshajabaynkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajabayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shajabayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshajabaynkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishajabayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shajabayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshajabaynkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishajabayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shajabayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshajabaynkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajabayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shajabaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshajabaynkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishajabaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shajabaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshajabaynkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishajabaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shajabaymuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajabaynkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajabaymuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
